section.heading: Short title

content.p: This chapter may be cited as the “Presidential Primary Matching Payment Account Act”.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 93–443, title IV, § 408(c), Oct. 15, 1974, 88 Stat. 1297.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section applicable with respect to taxable years beginning after Dec. 31, 1974, see section 410(c)(1) of Pub. L. 93–443, set out as an Effective Date of 1974 Amendment note under section 30101 of Title 52, Voting and Elections.
